# FoldVertical

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="FoldVertical icon">

<div class="dioxus-icons-widget" data-icon-name="FoldVertical" data-svg="&lt;svg xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot; width=&quot;24&quot; height=&quot;24&quot; viewBox=&quot;0 0 24 24&quot; 22v-6&quot;&gt;&lt;/path&gt;&lt;path d=&quot;M12 8V2&quot;&gt;&lt;/path&gt;&lt;path d=&quot;M4 12H2&quot;&gt;&lt;/path&gt;&lt;path d=&quot;M10 12H8&quot;&gt;&lt;/path&gt;&lt;path d=&quot;M16 class="a-p">:</span><span> </span><span class="a-co">2</span><span> </span><span class="a-p">}</span></code></pre><button type="button" class="dioxus-icons-widget-copy" data-di-copy="true" aria-label="Copy RSX snippet"><span data-di-copy-icon="true"></span><span data-di-copy-label="true">Copy RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::FoldVertical;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        FoldVertical { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
arrow, collapse, fold, vertical, dashed

## Categories
arrows, layout

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/fold-vertical)
